must_look_like: long narrow face with clean restrained lines
mature thirties appearance, not youthful
slim upright shoulders, straight back
short black hair neatly combed back or side-parted
deep dark suit with white shirt and subtle tie as police plainclothes identifier
restrained posture, calm and observant stance
narrow or gaunt face with slightly prominent cheekbones
mature but tense thirties-to-forties look
slightly hunched shoulders, unstable stance
short hair naturally tousled with windblown or cap mark effect
dark casual jacket or driver coat with old shirt as street-level identifier
forward-leaning tense posture, like ready to flee
rounder blunt face with soft jawline
fatigued forties middle-aged look
slightly slumped shoulders, tired posture
short black hair slightly messy with natural hairline
gray or deep blue business suit with wrinkled shirt and loose tie as office worker identifier
hesitant and protective stance, hands fidgety
standard neutral face, neither sharp nor round
varied adult age sense fitting police role
straight professional shoulders, orderly build
short practical hair, neat and functional
dark uniform or plainclothes jacket with badge as law enforcement identifier
disciplined upright posture, maintaining order
oval or small heart-shaped face with soft chin
youthful twenties stressed but adult look
tense narrow shoulders, guarded build
black medium-long straight hair or low ponytail
subdued everyday clothing in low-saturation tones as identifier, no flashy elements
restrained alert posture, hands clenched defensively
must_not_look_like: round blunt or long narrow face
